title: Effect Countdown
description: A client-side mod that warns you using sound cues when effects are running out. Configurable.
body:
In the minecraft servers I visit, I often find myself lurking around using Invisibility. However, I also often blow my cover through forgetting to renew said Invisibility.  
This mod is a lightweight client-side remedy: it plays a sound (tick sound, configurable) every second for the last ten seconds of the effect. (also configurable)

# contributing
have a feature you want to see, or a bug to report? head to [the issues tracker](https://github.com/vercte/effect-countdown/issues)! pull requests are welcome, too.
